item.title: Looking for my lost shaker of salt...
item.description: FLORIDA MAN ARRESTED AFTER BUILDING “EMOTIONAL SUPPORT TIKI BAR” IN WALMART PARKING LOT FOR STRESSED SHOPPERS ORLANDO, FL — Police arrested 45-year-old Brian Tucker after authorities say he constructed a tiki bar in the middle of a Walmart parking lot and began offering “therapy mojitos” to frustrated customers. According to witnesses, Tucker spent most of the afternoon greeting drivers with leis and asking: “Rough grocery trip, buddy?” Police say the makeshift tiki stand included bamboo roofing, string lights, folding bar stools, and a cocktail menu featuring drinks named: “The Child Support Colada” “The Rollback Rum Runner” and “The Self-Checkout Survivor.” Customers reportedly lined up after Tucker began handing out free samples to people leaving the store visibly angry. One witness told police: “I came out for batteries and somehow ended up discussing my divorce with a shirtless guy named Coconut Brian.” Authorities say Tucker claimed the bar was “a public service” after seeing too many stressed parents arguing near the garden center. The operation finally ended after officers noticed several shoppers sitting around the tiki hut chanting: “ONE MORE ROUND.” EDIT: Could be an "Onion" story. Couldn't find a source. Still funny at least. source https://www.instagram.com/p/DYv9fvqjuM3/
item.dc:creator: jarable

item.title: If you have to earn a wage to live, you’re not a capitalist.
item.description: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/malwaretech_you-know-things-are-getting-real-bad-when-share-7464754043379154944-O3Ta/ Companies always view employees as an expense. They will only be “loyal” to you when their needs require it. But will send you packing the moment they think they don’t need you or can find someone else who doesn’t cost as much.

item.title: Nice things seen recently. Enjoy !
item.description:
Anything.
Just saved the Country.
3D printed hair . Take my money !
Incredible freehand.
Kids today learning the classic moves.
1929 Fiat race car. Sound on !
Race boat from 1931 sporting Twin V16 engines pushing 3600 HP.
Amphibious bus in Rotterdam.
A real stunt from 1926 by Buster Keaton.
Today at noon thousands of red rose petals flutter down through the oculus of the Pantheon in Rome. This spectacular tradition is held each year on the feast of Pentecost.
Ok, that was smooth.
So Amazing.
Rock scalers manually prying loose debris off a cliff-side onto a closed highway.
This machine still uses punch cards and still works.
I don’t condone but it must feel nice.
Fitting 6 puzzle pieces into a box designed for 4.
Carrot topper.
A motorized boat trailer with 5 wheels on public roads.
A bike rack cart he recently made.
Breathtaking view of Mount Fuji from an aeroplane.
A book of interlocking gears.
The Citroën Karin (1980).
Nononoyes ...
Dangerous but satisfactory chain.
The police are working at a hotel.
Pouring molten metal into 1 kg bars.

item.title: Autistics can’t win
item.description: It’s hard out here for the autistics. Did you know 50-80% of college educated autistic folks are unemployed? It’s no wonder 33% of us struggle with suicidal ideation. I’m tired of being abandoned, fired, ghosted etc. Advice from neurodivergent fam welcome. (I’m not Mychal I just love him and identify with his struggle)
item.dc:creator: ThatOtherMacAvoyWoman

item.title: Peter Pickle: Relish the Moment
item.dc:creator: tractorist

item.title: Have you ever heard the story of Timnit Gebru? It's not a story the JedAI would tell you
item.description: Tl;dr: problems with AI: 1. Scaling creates more and more hallucinations 2. Biases and bigotry are magnified 3. Environment: training models needs a ton of energy, so as AI is used more and more, costs skyrocket 4. We have already lost track of training resources, so have no idea what the AIs are basing their interactions on. 5. Big one: information becomes subject to oligopolitic bias. I'm not flat-out against AI, however Mz Gebru absolutely nailed every one of my concerns about it, at least in abstract. Would have included a link to the paper but thought maybe including a sketchy looking link might be a bad call. It is available free and in PDF format if you're interested, you can search "Stochastic Parrots" and it's top of the list.
item.dc:creator: MakeItBackAlright

item.dc:creator: EyesOnICE

item.title: That was difficult. Glad he got it right.
item.dc:creator: Kyzyl

item.title: 2 summers and 1 spring later, my cordwood chicken coop is done
item.description:
Finished pictures first!
Panorama of the curved interior, I also built this curved roost bar.
First step is set the center line and spray paint where I will start digging the foundation.
Done digging!
Fill woth 5/8s clean aggregate and a drainage pipe is down there too.
Urbanite stem wall with type s mortar since this is technically against a hill
Found some leftover dimple mat to place against the hill to be a barrier from the hill and the building
Slowly making the stem wall taller
Poured a little entry pad to make the building continue to be circular. I also dry poured on the inside so it can be level as I work. Im not sure I would recommend the dry pour method. It ia pretty dusty.
Got the door frame up and in
Testing ro make sure i got it right.
And now on to building the cordwood walls and placing window bucks
More mid build images. The mortar here doesn't use any cement. It's just lime, sand, metakaolin, and fibers. The wood is cedar split cordwood.
Here i decided to pivot to a roof supported externally rather than the cordwood walls because I ran out of time and needed rain protection before fall.
Roof is nearly done! I used epdm. I painted the plywood underside a creamy white to match the cordwood walls.
During fall and winter I focused on making the vent boxes that I screwed between each rafter. Each one is cut uniquely to follow the curve and then covered with hardware cloth.
Ven boxes all up and walla getting higher
Back wall is mostly done! But now its fall and to cold to build more. So done until next spring
Can't build the walls in winter so now focused on the door. Used a chisel to cut where the hinge goes by hand
Pleased with myself! The door is level
And completely in!
Opens and closes smoothly, I did have to do a little planing and sanding but not to much.
The nesting boxes on the back of the door attached with a French cleat system
Getting closer
And closer
The bottles are super pretty when the light hits them right.
Finished shot of the interior! I also made the curved roost bar :)
item.dc:creator: Sctlbutt

item.title: Idiocracy is real.
item.dc:creator: siflandollysiflandollyshowROCK

item.title: I Helped Kill theCHIVE
item.description:
The Chive (aka theCHIVE) used to be one of the biggest websites on the internet. It also became one of the strangest places to exist as a trans woman online. This is the story of how that culture slowly collapsed in on itself until it could no longer exist as it was created: https://youtu.be/JpzjPVeBBOQ
Tell Cersei it was me... Live Chatting on the new video at 7:30am PST: https://youtu.be/JpzjPVeBBOQ
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: This is fine. But woe betide you if I show a nipple!
item.description: We used to have secret santa and the mods would mail you stickers if you posted a particularly neat post. I’m still here out of inertia or habit mostly. I’m going to post a frequently-banned image as a reply to each of those bot comments instead of reporting them. See which gets taken down first. Most Viral Edit: fuck you business daddy

item.title: GovBrief Today #480
item.description: On Memorial Day, America bombed Iran during a ceasefire while Iran's foreign minister negotiated peace in Doha. Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi and Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf flew to Qatar to work with mediators on the deal Trump keeps saying is "largely negotiated." Hours later, U.S. Central Command announced it had attacked Iranian missile sites and mine-laying boats, then called the strikes "restraint during the ongoing ceasefire." Trump says the deal is almost done. We broke the ceasefire while their negotiators sat at the peace table. How can anyone trust us after this? I've emailed 7,553 stories over 480 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at the website and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Free Subscription - https://gbounacos.substack.com Don't miss today's quote of the day, images, and data: https://go.govbrief.today/260525-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-may25 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/virus-research [3] https://go.govbrief.today/tank-safe [4] https://go.govbrief.today/delaney-sherrill [5] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-checkup [6] https://go.govbrief.today/ai-encylical Free Subscription - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1698 (walkable cities)
item.description:
Let's get this bread (pictured, Georgian cheese and egg bread)
Clay-colored Robin
Yeaaaaaaahhhhhhhhhh baby
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Pippin. Pippin. Okay." ___ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.dc:creator: Doomgriever

item.title: Mama needs to really hear me
item.description:
Mama Bobbie is very much struggling with her new identity as NOT a mama. She keeps dragging her kittens around. To where? I don’t know. She doesn’t know. But she’s taking them to safety.
Bobbie! You don’t need to do this!
I need you to hear me, mama Bobbie. Your babies are safe! They are fed and playful and happy. I’ve never once in twelve years had a mama cat who was SO concerned about her kittens this long. Like, not even close. This just speaks to how much of a good mama she is. She’s going to her forever home this Saturday and I can’t wait to see how she flourishes!!
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: Wish us luck!
item.description: Jess just texted me asking if I can take a single kitten who needs a foster. She looks to be about the same age as the Guatemala Kittens I already have, so wish us luck that she gets along with everyone!
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays
